response.justification: Well over the required experience bar with strong full-stack TypeScript/Node.js and React work at multiple companies, plus current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling experience that directly matches an unusual role requirement. Deep testing culture (TDD, test-framework authorship, testing workshops), MongoDB/MySQL, Docker/Kubernetes, and AWS exposure cover most of the stack; the main gaps are no explicit Nest.js or Vitest usage and limited Kotlin/Python evidence.
strengths: 13+ years of full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work, matching the role's AI agent requirement
Strong engineering craft: TDD, CI/CD, test-framework authorship, and teaching/workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest/Jest experience listed
Kotlin and Python proficiency not demonstrated (Java exposure is dated)
Significant career time in niche DLang work less relevant to the primary stack

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
Missing Nest.js/Vitest and weak Kotlin/Python evidence
